title: Songs Of Darkness
description: A Fan-Made mod all about songs power from `Song of War` Movie check it out on youtube
body:
This mod just does that, adds only the songs cubes with theyr own power\
it only gives potion effects sorry i don't have knowledge to make like give the Protisium Song ProtoBarrier or ProtoClone\
But in my way i've added things such Aggresium Song is a Combatant Song , Mobilium Protisium and Supporium have defensive cappabilities\
And also more song cubes that are not in SoW movie like Weaponarium Song this one is a random from someone that i found and another that i made as
MagnetiSphuronic Song which is an ultimate prime song since it combines the 2 Prime Songs into 1\
The way you can get the songs is thru villagers at this point and also do NOT expect to `Wow its ez to get them` in the future the songs will be MUCH expensive and will no longer be gottem from villagers.

### It currently adds
- 4 Normal Songs Power
- 4 Prime Songs Power
- Advancments for them
- Custom-Made Songs by me which are NOT in SoW Movie

In the future maybe i will add more but for now thats all.

This mod is also made in Mcreator.\
If you want to contact me on discord my name is > NGeorge#5042

The source code will not be available for this mod since you can decompile the jar without any problems since the `JAR` is deobfuscated
